entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: Potentially productive soils with high clay content and water storage capacity found in dry tropics

entities.name: DRY TROPICS
entities.description: Region where Vertisols are located

entities.name: WATER STORAGE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of deep Vertisols to store water for cropping

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where the research and cropping practices are observed

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Precipitation levels that determine cropping duration and technology success

entities.name: CLAY CONTENT
entities.description: High percentage of clay in Vertisols that creates management challenges

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for yield and profit

entities.name: INDIAN SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Specific region in India where small farmers manage Vertisols

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period after the rainy season used for cropping

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research center that developed and tested the improved management technology

entities.name: IMPROVED MANAGEMENT TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A system involving growing two crops per year, one in the rainy season and one in the post-rainy season

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period of high rainfall used for the first crop in the improved technology

entities.name: EROSION CONTROL
entities.description: The reduction of soil loss achieved through improved management

entities.name: MOISTURE CONSERVATION
entities.description: The retention of soil moisture achieved through improved management

entities.name: RAINFALL-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which crops utilize available rainfall

entities.name: ANNUAL YIELDS
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced per unit area per year

entities.name: CEREAL
entities.description: Grain crops produced using the improved management technology

entities.name: LEGUME GRAINS
entities.description: Leguminous grain crops produced using the improved management technology

entities.name: ON-FARM TESTS
entities.description: Evaluation of the improved technology in actual farming environments

entities.name: AGROCLIMATES
entities.description: Specific climatic conditions of agricultural areas

entities.name: GROSS PROFITS
entities.description: The total financial gain resulting from the improved technology

entities.name: TRADITIONAL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Management practice involving only post-rainy season cropping

entities.name: MARGINAL RATE OF RETURN
entities.description: The financial return ratio for the additional expenses of the improved technology

entities.name: MULTILOCATIONAL TESTING
entities.description: A coordinated program for testing technology across various environments
